prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2021–2026年连续稳居第10名，属全国Top10顶尖高校，办学层次极高；2023年声誉偏负面（宿舍通勤问题），2024年偏 负面（师德师风谣言，警方已立案），2025–2026年声誉文件未收录该校，表明近期无重大舆情波动；抖音热度总排名第24（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度平稳。\ n第五轮学科评估A-及以上共13个学科：动力工程及工程热物理A+、电气工程A+、机械工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、数学A、材料科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A 、工商管理A、力学A、管理科学与工程A、马克思主义理论A、电子科学与技术A-、生物医学工程A-；工科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类 、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与西安交大王牌工科高度契合，有利于维持报考热度；福建省2026年普通高考总人数约26.79万，按近 年物理类占比约76%估算，物理类考生约20.4万人，较2025年（19.2万）增加约6.1%，竞争加剧，本科批物理类2025年为441分，近年稳中有升；西安交通大学位于陕西西安，非福建省内高校，无本地招生倾斜；福建省考生对省外985高校报考意愿较强，西安交大作为C9高校在福建认可度高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025 年基准位次3867名、2026年计划小幅扩招1.5%、福建省物理类考生增加约6.1%以及学校顶尖工科实力维持高热度，预测2026年最低位次 约3871名，区间3430–4312名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2036 → 1950 → 3546 → 3883 → 3867. Since 2023, the ranking has noticeably shifted backward, stabilizing in the 3500–3900 range in recent three years. The baseline for 2025 is about 3867. The enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 137, 132, 80, 130, and 137 respectively, with 137 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 139, a slight expansion of about 1.5% compared to 2025, which has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked 10th in the Soft Science Main Ranking from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top 10 elite universities nationwide with extremely high academic level. In 2023, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory commuting issues); in 2024, slightly negative (teacher ethics rumors, police have filed a case); from 2025 to 2026, the school was not included in reputation files, indicating no major public opinion fluctuations recently. Douyin heat total ranking 24th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high, application attention stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Mathematics A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Business Administration A, Mechanics A, Management Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Biomedical Engineering A-; engineering strength is top in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Xi'an Jiaotong University's flagship engineering disciplines, helping maintain application heat. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Fujian Province is about 267,900. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 76%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 204,000, an increase of about 6.1% compared to 2025 (192,000), intensifying competition. The undergraduate batch Physics Category cutoff in 2025 was 441 points, steadily rising in recent years. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a university within Fujian Province, with no local enrollment preference. Fujian candidates have a strong willingness to apply to out-of-province 985 universities, and Xi'an Jiaotong University, as a C9 university, has high recognition in Fujian.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3867, a slight 1.5% expansion in 2026 plan, an increase of about 6.1% in Fujian Physics Category candidates, and the school's top engineering strength maintaining high heat, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 3871, with a range of 3430–4312.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3430–4312, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3400), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship engineering pilot classes and Qian Xuesen Class. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 4200), it is recommended to choose Tier 3 medical and management majors as a safe option.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 857 → 814 → 789 → 833 → 935, fluctuating within the 800–950 range in recent years. In 2025, the ranking shifted to 935, the lowest in the past five years. The planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 8, 10, 15, 13, and 13 respectively. In 2026, the plan is only 9 students, a significant reduction of about 30.8% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked 10th in the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top 10 prestigious universities nationwide. In 2023, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory issues), in 2024 slightly negative (rumors about teacher ethics), and from 2025 to 2026, the university was not included, with no major recent public opinion incidents. Douyin popularity ranked 24th overall (relatively popular), with moderate to high attention. Xi'an Jiaotong University is known for engineering, and the History Category majors (Liberal Arts Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature, International Economic and Trade Rules, Network and New Media, Public Administration) are not the university's core strengths, with limited relevant discipline evaluation data.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (related to International Economic and Trade Rules) is socially popular and recommended, Network and New Media/Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged, Foreign Languages and Literature is generally neutral. In Fujian Province, the estimated number of History Category candidates in 2026 is about 64,000, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025 (60,000), intensifying competition. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi, not a local university in Fujian, with no regional enrollment preference. Fujian History Category candidates have average willingness to apply for liberal arts majors at 985 universities outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 935, a significant 30.8% reduction in the 2026 plan, an approximately 6.2% increase in History Category candidates, and the non-core advantage of the university's liberal arts majors, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 777, with a range of 688–866.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 700), you can focus on aiming for the International Economic and Trade Rules major.
